query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_permissions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  modulo VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  pode_visualizar TINYINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  pode_editar TINYINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  pode_excluir TINYINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  pode_exportar TINYINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_user_modulo (userId, modulo)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS convites (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  email VARCHAR(320) NOT NULL,
  nome VARCHAR(255),
  role ENUM('user', 'admin') DEFAULT 'user' NOT NULL,
  token VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  criadoPor INT NOT NULL,
  usado TINYINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  usadoPor INT,
  usadoEm TIMESTAMP,
  expiraEm TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  permissoes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS audit_log (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  acao VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  modulo VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  detalhes TEXT,
  ip VARCHAR(45),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
